# `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE`

## Description
`This directory holds the GitHub issue forms used for hosted intake. Use these forms to capture structured requests and route them into the repo-local planning and task model.`

## Files
| Path | Description |
|---|---|
| `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/README.md` | Describes the purpose of the GitHub issue-form directory and its current forms. |
| `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml` | Configures the GitHub issue-form landing page and contact links. |
| `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.yml` | Hosted intake form for proposed features or workstreams. |
| `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.yml` | Hosted intake form for defects, regressions, or broken governed behavior. |
| `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/governance_chore.yml` | Hosted intake form for repository standards, docs, control-plane, or workflow maintenance. |

## Notes
- These forms are for hosted intake, not for replacing repo-local PRDs, decisions, designs, or tasks.
- Before implementation merges, link or create the matching repo-local planning or task artifact.
